Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dalton Foster]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Dalton Foster is the gunner on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Foster is at the gunsmith up the hill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Dalton Foster is Calder's gunner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Foster was once a gunsmith and is somewhat of a hermit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Dalton Foster was an original maker of certain pistols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Dalton Foster is a person once admired by Calder's gunner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Foster is a character associated with a cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Foster has a tendency to shoot people who wake him up in the middle of the night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Foster mans the wheel of the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Dalton Foster is an old gunner who uses the false name Duster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Foster is a character who visited the main base of the Blackwatch with Andel and Petal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Foster fired his musket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Foster inspects a musket barrel through reading-glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Foster is a character located in the crow's nest clutching muskets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Foster is a person Calder thinks might be able to help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Foster is a crewmember who wears shooting-glasses and reading-glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Dalton Foster is a crew member tasked with taking notes during meetings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Foster uses shooting-glasses and reading-glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Foster is a character present in the room with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Foster encouraged Calder to use the crown's power on the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Foster is present in the hallway with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Foster was following Calder through the forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Foster is with Calder and Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Dalton Foster is a character who asks what happened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Foster shot the Child of Nakothi in its tiny head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Foster is a person Calder compares himself to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Foster is a gunner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Dalton Foster was at the wheel of the ship.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Dalton Foster is a gunner and a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Dalton Foster is a grizzled old man and one of the greatest gunsmiths in the Empire's history.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Foster is a character on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Foster is a passenger on The Testament who was tinkering with a cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Foster is a member of Calder's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Foster is with Calder and Andel to test the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Foster is poisoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Foster is a passenger on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Dalton Foster is a member of Calder's crew and has upgraded the ship's armory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Foster is unlikely to raise a real objection to Jerri joining the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Foster knows about alchemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Foster is present during the conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Foster is capable of firing on the Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Foster tests his weapons twice a day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Foster is a Reader on the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Foster mocks Calder's abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Foster uses a pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Dalton Foster's family (former wife and children) are gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Foster has Reader's senses.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Dalton Foster's intent is described as irritation, focus, and mild frustration.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Foster's toolbelt is his Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Foster is a crew member on The Testament responsible for the guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Foster is a crew member who supports the group with long guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Foster shouted with his head halfway up a cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Foster is someone who can make guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Dalton Foster is a man who has a cabin on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Dalton Foster sent Lotta to find Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Foster announced that the Captain had an emergency signal for the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Dalton is addressed by Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Foster uses floating tools to manipulate gems and silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Dalton Foster is a man who uses a Soulbound Vessel to work on projects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Dalton Foster is a gunsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Dalton Foster is a member of a Navigator crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Foster cheated with Awakening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Foster passed out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Foster explained that the Emperor’s armor kept Petal from dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Foster is in charge of driving citizens to a guarded checkpoint.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Foster spoke to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Foster is a crew member who holds a matchstick.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Foster is on the ramp of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Foster stands behind a cannon wearing shooting-glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Foster is a character who clapped Calder on the shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Foster is standing on the left of Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Foster uses a sharpened fire poker as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Foster was holding a smoking gun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Foster looked through the broken railing at what was in the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Foster uses an Awakened gun named Oath to Eternity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Foster uses shooting-glasses and a musket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Foster has a wooden peg leg.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
